message:
Dear Sir/Madam,

A Leave Application has been submitted by {{ doc.employee }}. Please review the details below and take the necessary action.

Application Summary:

  • Employee: {{ doc.employee }}
  • Leave Type: {{ doc.leave_type }}
  • From Date: {{ frappe.utils.format_date(doc.from_date, "dd-MM-yyyy") }}
  • To Date: {{ frappe.utils.format_date(doc.to_date, "dd-MM-yyyy") }}
  • Total Leave Days: {{ doc.total_leave_days }}
  • Workflow State: {{ doc.workflow_state }}
  • View Request: {% set leave_app_link = frappe.utils.get_url() ~ '/app/leave-application/' ~ doc.name %} Click here
name: Leave Application Approval
subject: Leave Application: {{doc.workflow_state}} - {{ doc.employee }}
